description: Verifies request bodies are captured with parseable start/stop markers for reasoning agent, worker dispatch, and multi-iteration content flow

initial_state.test_context: «DYNAMIC_CONTEXT_START» This test context was injected via dynamic instruction template {test_key: test_value, marker: roundtrip_check} «DYNAMIC_CONTEXT_END»

responses.note: Reasoning agent emits execute_code with REPL code containing guillemet-delimited artifact dict and llm_query worker dispatch with instruction markers.

args.code:
artifact = {"«ARTIFACT_START»": True, "repo_name": "test-repo", "files": {"main.py": "print('hello')", "utils.py": "def add(a,b): return a+b"}, "metadata": {"token_estimate": 42, "shard_index": 0}, "«ARTIFACT_END»": True}
result = llm_query("«WORKER_INSTRUCTION_START» Analyze this code artifact and summarize its purpose «WORKER_INSTRUCTION_END»\n\n" + str(artifact))
print(result)
print("«STDOUT_SENTINEL_START» This is a known stdout string from iteration 1 «STDOUT_SENTINEL_END»")

responses.note: Worker response with guillemet-delimited response markers.

parts.text: «WORKER_RESPONSE_START» The code artifact contains a simple Python project with a main entry point and utility functions for basic arithmetic «WORKER_RESPONSE_END»

responses.note: Reasoning sees worker response and stdout sentinel in tool result, produces final answer with guillemet markers.

parts.text:
The worker analysis is complete. The code artifact is a simple utility project.

FINAL(«FINAL_ANSWER_START» Analysis complete: simple Python project with entry point and utilities «FINAL_ANSWER_END»)

expected.final_answer: «FINAL_ANSWER_START» Analysis complete: simple Python project with entry point and utilities «FINAL_ANSWER_END»
